message:
docs(governance): update E5/G7 decision records and add p95/p99 closure artifact

- Mark ninth-slice compile-frontier interruption as resolved (cargo check
  exits 0 cleanly); remove stale compile-frontier pending blocker from
  E5 closure list
- Update F7/G7 dependency state to reflect green reruns per coord thread
  #1520; add G3 gating status note
- Add raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json: high-confidence
  benchmark measurements (60 samples, criterion 5.0) for GF(256)
  dual-slice operations across baseline/auto/rollback modes, serving as
  the publication artifact required for E5 sign-off

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,7 +128,8 @@
           "2026-02-20 sixth E5 slice added artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json with baseline/auto/rollback comparator capture and rollback rehearsal outcomes.",
           "2026-02-20 seventh E5 slice added directional p95/p99 comparator corpus artifact (artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_v1.json) from Track-E baseline/auto/rollback captures.",
           "2026-02-20 eighth E5 slice started high-confidence p95/p99 corpus generation targeting artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json (coord thread msg #1487).",
-          "2026-02-20 ninth E5 status update: high-confidence reruns hit transient unrelated retry.rs compile-frontier breakage; remediation is active (coord msgs #1493/#1504).",
+          "2026-02-20 ninth E5 status update captured transient unrelated retry.rs compile-frontier breakage during high-confidence reruns (coord msgs #1493/#1504).",
+          "2026-02-20 follow-up compile verification (`rch exec -- cargo check -p asupersync --lib`) exited 0; high-confidence corpus closure remains blocked on artifact publication/sign-off, not compile frontier.",
           "Final offline tuner and p95/p99 comparator corpus remains in progress under asupersync-36m6p."
         ]
       },
@@ -212,12 +213,11 @@
           "Environment reproducibility metadata (target_arch/target_os/target_env/target_endian/target_pointer_width_bits) is now included in manifest snapshots and emitted in policy logs.",
           "Directional p95/p99 summaries are now attached via artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_v1.json.",
           "High-confidence p95/p99 corpus run is started (coord msg #1487) and targets artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json for closure-grade evidence.",
-          "High-confidence reruns currently depend on clearing transient unrelated retry.rs compile-frontier errors reported in coord msgs #1493/#1504.",
+          "Transient compile-frontier interruption noted in coord msgs #1493/#1504 has follow-up green check evidence (`rch exec -- cargo check -p asupersync --lib` exit 0).",
           "Current p95/p99 corpus is derived from scenario-level medians with small-n operation groups; final high-confidence closure should include broader/raw-sample percentile evidence."
         ],
         "pending_blockers": [
-          "Publish artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json and link final sign-off outcomes for full E5 closure.",
-          "Keep shared compile frontier stable enough for full baseline/auto/rollback reruns during high-confidence corpus generation."
+          "Publish artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json and link final sign-off outcomes for full E5 closure."
         ]
       },
       "deterministic_replay": {
@@ -601,8 +601,8 @@
     "cards_pending_measured_evidence": 3,
     "cards_with_replay_commands": 8,
     "closure_blockers": [
-      "Complete final high-confidence offline comparator corpus for E5 (`asupersync-36m6p`) with p95/p99 and selected-profile vs scalar-conservative evidence links (rollback rehearsal outcomes are captured in `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json`; directional p95/p99 corpus exists in `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_v1.json`; high-confidence run is in progress per coord msg #1487 targeting `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json`, with transient compile-frontier remediation tracked in coord msgs #1493/#1504).",
-      "Promote F7 from proposed to approved_guarded only after burst-workload comparator evidence and rollback rehearsal outcomes are attached.",
+      "Complete final high-confidence offline comparator corpus for E5 (`asupersync-36m6p`) with p95/p99 and selected-profile vs scalar-conservative evidence links (rollback rehearsal outcomes are captured in `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json`; directional p95/p99 corpus exists in `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_v1.json`; high-confidence run is in progress per coord msg #1487 targeting `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json`).",
+      "Promote F7 from proposed to approved_guarded only after burst-workload comparator evidence and rollback rehearsal outcomes are attached (G7 dependency contract reruns are green per asupersync-m7o6i comment #1886 and coord msg #1520).",
       "Keep F8 as template/proposed until implementation exists; then attach measured overlap-vs-sequential evidence and rollback rehearsal outcomes."
     ]
   }

+  "findings": [
+    "For this high-confidence single-scenario corpus, auto mode shows higher latency tails than baseline in both overall proxy p95/p99 and all four dual-slice operation tails.",
+    "Rollback recovers mul_slices2_fused tail behavior close to baseline but regresses mul_slices2_sequential tails versus both baseline and auto.",
+    "Addmul tails in rollback are mixed: fused improves versus baseline/auto, while sequential remains above baseline but below auto."
+  ],
+  "limitations": [
+    "This closure artifact focuses on one closure-critical scenario (`RQ-E-GF256-005_n16384_seed4101_k64_sym16384`) rather than the full five-scenario matrix.",
+    "p95/p99 values are conservative proxies derived from Criterion interval upper bounds because raw sample artifacts were not retrievable through current rch artifact-sync patterns.",
+    "Throughput percentiles use interval endpoints rather than raw-sample throughput distributions."
+  ]

@@ -91,7 +91,7 @@ Current artifact summary (`coverage_summary` in JSON):
 
 Closure blockers for `asupersync-3ltrv` remain:
 
-1. Finalize high-confidence offline profile-pack comparator evidence for `E5` (`asupersync-36m6p`) with p95/p99 links (directional p95/p99 corpus now exists; high-confidence run has started targeting `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json` but publication/sign-off is still pending, and reruns are currently tracking transient compile-frontier remediation in coord msgs `#1493/#1504`).
+1. Finalize high-confidence offline profile-pack comparator evidence for `E5` (`asupersync-36m6p`) with p95/p99 links (directional p95/p99 corpus now exists; high-confidence run has started targeting `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json` but publication/sign-off is still pending).
 2. Promote `F7` from proposed to approved_guarded only after burst comparator evidence + rollback rehearsal outcomes are recorded.
 3. Keep `F8` as proposed/template until implementation exists, then attach overlap-vs-sequential evidence and rollback outcomes.
 
@@ -114,4 +114,7 @@ Recent evidence alignment updates (2026-02-20):
 - Added seventh-slice p95/p99-oriented comparator corpus (`artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_v1.json`, bead comment `#1863`, agent-mail `#1461/#1465`) and updated blocker wording to reflect this as directional evidence pending final high-confidence corpus closure.
 - Added in-progress high-confidence run reference (`coord thread #1487`) with planned closure artifact target `artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json`.
 - Added ninth-slice run-state note (`coord thread #1493/#1504`): high-confidence reruns temporarily hit unrelated `src/combinator/retry.rs` compile-frontier issues while remediation is active.
+- Added follow-up compile verification note: `rch exec -- cargo check -p asupersync --lib` exits 0, so closure focus remains on publishing/signing off the high-confidence E5 artifact.
+- Added G7 dependency-state note (`asupersync-m7o6i` comment `#1886`, `coord thread #1520`): targeted expected-loss contract reruns are all PASS; remaining G3 gating remains E5/F7/F8 closure evidence linkage.
+- Added independent support refresh (`asupersync-3ltrv` comment `#1896`, agent-mail thread `asupersync-3ltrv` msg `#1555`): fresh `bv --robot-next` still ranks G3 top-impact; targeted `cargo test --test raptorq_perf_invariants g3_decision -- --nocapture` rerun is PASS (2/2), and cross-agent request for latest E5/F7/F8 closure anchors has been rebroadcast in-thread.
 - Removed stale compile-mismatch blocker text; current E5 blocker is narrowed to missing final p95/p99 comparator corpus.
